payload.label: bed
payload.long_description: Partial crop of a bed corner showing a beige-gray striped duvet cover with thin darker stripes and light wrinkles draped over the mattress and a visible dark wooden frame; the bed is cut off by the image edge and appears about 0.7 m from the camera.
